prompt: Hero raised preflop and villain called. Who has initiative on the flop?
intro_v1: Read who made the last aggressive action first. Initiative usually stays with that player on the next street.
why_v1: Hero made the last aggressive action, so hero keeps initiative.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hero raised last, so hero keeps initiative on the flop.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Hero has initiative here because hero made the last aggressive action.
